query:
INSERT INTO tachyon_apps_crm.provider_object_mappings (
                entity_id, tenant_id, provider_name,
                provider_primary_id, object_name,
                created_at, updated_at
            ) VALUES (?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?)
            ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE
                provider_name = VALUES(provider_name),
                provider_primary_id = VALUES(provider_primary_id),
                object_name = VALUES(object_name),
                updated_at = VALUES(updated_at)
